skill.name: longbridge-market-data
skill.description: Use the Longbridge CLI to retrieve market data for HK, US, A-share, and Singapore securities. Supports quotes, K-line data, order book depth, trades, capital flow, market status, exchange rates, IPO calendars, ADR premium, and FX carry analysis.
skill.summary: Fetch Longbridge market data for quotes, charts, order books, trades, capital flow, exchange rates, and IPO calendars.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only Markdown skill that documents Longbridge CLI workflows for market data. The static external-command and weak-crypto alerts are false positives caused by Markdown code formatting, command examples, formulas, and market terminology. No malicious intent, prompt injection, scripts, or data exfiltration paths were found, but local CLI and network-backed data access remain disclosed risk factors.

low_findings.title: False positive: Markdown backticks treated as execution
low_findings.description: The scanner flagged Markdown inline code and fenced command examples as Ruby or shell backtick execution. These files are documentation and do not execute code themselves.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are Markdown prose or fenced examples. There is no Ruby source, shell script, or executable wrapper in the skill files.

low_findings.title: False positive: Weak cryptography pattern in market text
low_findings.description: The scanner flagged weak-cryptography patterns in market-data documentation. The cited content describes A/H premiums, depth, symbols, or formulas, not cryptographic algorithms.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched terms appear in financial-market context. I found no hashing, encryption, password storage, or cryptographic implementation.

low_findings.title: False positive: Legitimate project URL
low_findings.description: The scanner flagged a hardcoded URL. The URL points to the public Longbridge terminal GitHub project for installation guidance, not an exfiltration endpoint.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URL is used in an installation troubleshooting row. It does not receive secrets, payloads, or user data.

low_findings.title: Operational risk: Local authenticated CLI session
low_findings.description: Some workflows may use a local Longbridge session token for subscriptions or trade-permission IPO data. This is legitimate, but users should understand the authentication boundary.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The files explicitly describe authenticated local session use. I found no instruction to extract, display, or transmit tokens outside Longbridge tooling.

content.value_statement: Market data queries often require separate terminals and symbol formats. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through Longbridge CLI workflows.
actual_capabilities: Fetch real-time quotes for HK, US, A-share, and Singapore securities.
Retrieve K-line, intraday, and trade tick data for chart analysis.
Query order book depth, broker queues, and recent trades.
Summarize capital flow, market sentiment temperature, and trading sessions.
Look up exchange rates, security lists, market participants, and IPO calendars.
Guide A/H premium, ADR premium, and FX carry analysis workflows.
limitations: Requires the Longbridge CLI locally or a configured Longbridge MCP server.
Authenticated workflows need the user to log in through Longbridge tooling.
Market data availability depends on Longbridge coverage and permissions.
Ambiguous company names require symbol and market confirmation.

use_cases.title: Monitor active positions
use_cases.description: Check current prices, change percentages, volume, and market status for watched securities.

use_cases.title: Prepare chart analysis
use_cases.description: Retrieve K-line, intraday, and trade tick data before technical review.

use_cases.title: Review cross-market opportunities
use_cases.description: Compare A/H premiums, ADR pricing, exchange rates, and carry trade assumptions.

prompt_templates.title: Check one quote
prompt_templates.prompt: What is the current price of NVDA.US?

prompt_templates.title: Compare several symbols
prompt_templates.prompt: Show quotes for 700.HK, AAPL.US, and 600519.SH with price, change, and volume.

prompt_templates.title: Fetch chart history
prompt_templates.prompt: Get daily K-line data for TSLA.US from 2026-01-01 to 2026-06-01.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze market structure
prompt_templates.prompt: Review 700.HK order book depth, broker queue support, and recent trade direction.

output_examples.input: What is the current price of NVDA.US?
output: NVDA.US last traded at 142.56 USD, up 1.67% for the session.
Volume was 45.2 million shares, with turnover near 6.44 billion USD.
700.HK daily K-line shows three higher closes in the last five sessions.
The latest close was 390.40 HKD, above the five-session average close.
939.HK has a negative A/H premium, so the H-share trades below the A-share equivalent.
The spread may reflect liquidity, currency, and access constraints.

best_practices: Confirm the symbol format before running a Longbridge command.
Use JSON output when the assistant needs to parse market data.
Surface Longbridge errors clearly instead of hiding failed requests.
anti_patterns: Do not guess a market suffix when a company name is ambiguous.
Do not treat example prices as current market data.
Do not expose local session tokens or authentication details in responses.

faq.question: Which markets does this skill cover?
faq.answer: It covers Longbridge-supported HK, US, A-share, and Singapore market data.

faq.question: Does it need a Longbridge login?
faq.answer: Most public market data can work without login. Subscriptions and trade-permission IPO data require Longbridge authentication.

faq.question: What symbol format should I use?
faq.answer: Use ticker plus market suffix, such as NVDA.US, 700.HK, 600519.SH, or D05.SG.

faq.question: Can it place trades?
faq.answer: No. This skill focuses on market data, IPO information, and analysis workflows, not order placement.

faq.question: What happens if the CLI is missing?
faq.answer: The skill can use a configured Longbridge MCP server, or explain how to install the Longbridge terminal.

faq.question: Does it provide investment advice?
faq.answer: No. It retrieves and summarizes market data. Users remain responsible for investment decisions.
